explanation: The property states that while the system is in PSV mode, if the patient does not trigger a breath within the apnea trigger window (i.e., the breathing time becomes greater than or equal to the apnea lag time), the ventilator must immediately switch to PCV mode and set the respiratory rate, inspiratory pressure, and I:E ratio to their respective apnea backup values. This directly captures the conditional mode switch and parameter setting described in the requirement.
decision2_substring: If the patient does not trigger a breath within the time of the apnea trigger window (apnea lag)
decision3_substring: the ventilator shall switch to PCV mode (apnea backup ventilation) with respiratory rate RR_AP, inspiratory pressure P_inspAP , and the ratio between inspiratory time and Expiratory time I:E_AP.
output_structured_natural_language: while PSVMode, upon breathingTime_greaterThanOrEqual_apneaLagTime, immediately satisfy PCVMode & RR_equalTo_RR_AP & P_insp_equalTo_P_inspAP & ItoE_equalTo_ItoE_AP

This accurately captures the requirement for apnea backup ventilation within the PSV operating mode.
